description_long: This is a rustic wooden barn with a steeply pitched gable roof, constructed from vertically aligned weathered wooden planks. The front facade features a single, centered hinged door with a small overhanging awning and a transom window above it. Both long sides of the barn have two evenly spaced rectangular windows, allowing natural light into the interior. The rear of the barn includes a covered porch area supported by posts, accessible via a small set of steps. The roof extends well beyond the walls, providing additional shelter and emphasizing the barn's traditional form. The overall structure is simple yet functional, evoking the classic American rural barn aesthetic.
description: A traditional wooden barn with a steep gable roof, vertical plank siding, and a front door with a small awning. It features side windows and a rear covered porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main hinged door, small awning, and a transom window above the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view displaying two evenly spaced rectangular windows and the full length of the gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the covered porch area, support posts, and steps leading up to the porch.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two rectangular windows, mirroring the other side, and a partial view of the porch.
attribute_door_style: single hinged door with a small overhanging awning
attribute_window_arrangement: two evenly spaced rectangular windows on each long side, one transom window above the front door
